steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The passage lists neighborhood type and individual physical fitness as examples of factors studies emphasize, then shifts to multiple conditions and needs inform individuals' choices—signaling that these factors represent only some elements in the larger, complex picture of walking decisions.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content: B captures both aspects: factors “that have been identified as important influences on walking decisions” and “merely some of the many factors that may contribute”—presenting what studies identify alongside the text's broader emphasis on complexity. The others either claim people rarely consider these factors, confine them to Lisbon, or misstate the text's position. That matches choice B — B is correct.
